note: Machine-readable mirror of README.md. `verified: true` means independently confirmed against the provider's own official docs on `last_verified`. `verified: false` means sourced from community tracking and not yet independently re-verified in this repo — treat those numbers as indicative, not authoritative.

providers.name: Google Gemini API (AI Studio)
providers.free_tier: Gemini 2.5 Flash, 2.5 Flash-Lite, 2.5 Pro (limited), embeddings, TTS models
providers.rate_limits: Varies by model, roughly 5-30 req/min and 20-500 req/day depending on model
providers.notes: Free-tier prompts/outputs may be used by Google to improve its products when used outside the UK/CH/EEA/EU

providers.name: Groq
providers.rate_limits: e.g. llama-3.1-8b-instant: 30 RPM/14.4K RPD/6K TPM/500K TPD; llama-3.3-70b-versatile: 30 RPM/1K RPD/12K TPM/100K TPD; qwen3-32b: 60 RPM/1K RPD/6K TPM/500K TPD; similar for GPT-OSS and Whisper models
providers.notes: Limits apply at the organization level, not per API key

providers.name: OpenRouter
providers.rate_limits: 20 req/min; 50 req/day under 10 credits purchased lifetime, 1000 req/day once 10+ credits purchased (one-time, not a subscription)
providers.notes: ToS (Apr 2026) prohibits resale or building a competing service on the free models; private proxy for personal use is fine

providers.name: Cloudflare Workers AI
providers.rate_limits: 30+ models: LLMs (Llama, Mistral, DeepSeek, Qwen...), embeddings, image, audio
providers.notes: Resets daily at 00:00 UTC; overage on a Workers Paid plan bills at $0.011/1,000 Neurons

providers.name: GitHub Models
providers.free_tier: Included with any GitHub account via Copilot tier
providers.rate_limits: Copilot Free: ~15 RPM / 150 RPD on "low" tier models, 8K input / 4K output tokens per request. Higher Copilot tiers raise the ceiling
providers.notes: Scoped by GitHub to experimentation/prototyping, not production traffic

providers.name: Cohere
providers.rate_limits: 1,000 API calls/month total; 20 req/min chat; 2,000 inputs/min embed; 10 req/min rerank
providers.notes: Explicitly for evaluation only — Cohere's terms prohibit production/commercial use on a trial key

providers.name: Cerebras
providers.rate_limits: Now officially published per-model: 5 RPM / 30,000 TPM / 1,000,000 TPH / 1,000,000 TPD (e.g. gpt-oss-120b, zai-glm-4.7, gemma-4-31b); limits vary by model
providers.notes: Free tier includes community support (Discord) only; paid Developer tier gives "10x higher" rate limits

providers.name: Mistral (La Plateforme)
providers.free_tier: "Restrictive" free tier explicitly for "try and explore" — official docs say to upgrade for "actual projects and production use"
providers.rate_limits: Not published publicly; exact caps only visible in-console after login (admin.mistral.ai)
providers.notes: Phone verification required to activate; free tier is opt-in for data training

providers.name: HuggingFace
providers.free_tier: Free CPU Basic + ZeroGPU for Spaces; Inference Providers still has a monthly credit ($0.10/mo on Free plan, $2.00/mo on PRO/Team/Enterprise)
providers.rate_limits: No RPM/TPM published, only credit amounts
providers.notes: Credits only apply with "Routed by Hugging Face" billing, not with a Custom Provider Key

providers.name: Fireworks AI
providers.rate_limits: Various open-weight models
providers.notes: Default monthly spend cap of $50 for new accounts; no card needed to activate the $1 credit, card needed once it's spent

providers.name: Baseten
providers.rate_limits: Any supported model, compute-based pricing
providers.notes: No documented expiration date publicly

providers.name: Nebius AI Studio
providers.rate_limits: Various open-weight models
providers.notes: Product renamed to "Nebius Token Factory"

providers.name: Novita AI
providers.rate_limits: Various open-weight models
providers.notes: Corrected from a previously listed "$0.50/year" figure, which does not appear on any official Novita domain; separate referral program ("Give $10, Earn $10") also exists

providers.name: AI21 Labs
providers.rate_limits: Jamba Large/Mini: 10 RPS / 200 RPM by default
providers.notes: Card not required for the trial credit itself, required once it expires

providers.name: Upstage
providers.rate_limits: Solar Pro / Solar Mini
providers.notes: $10 credit confirmed via the official pricing page; the "3 months" validity window could not be confirmed in accessible official sources (console is robots.txt-blocked) — flagged for re-verification

providers.name: NLP Cloud
providers.rate_limits: Variable by model, no numeric RPM/TPM published
providers.notes: Corrected: the official registration page does not ask for a phone number, contradicting the earlier listing

providers.name: Alibaba Cloud (Model Studio)
providers.free_tier: 1,000,000 tokens (example figure, varies by model), valid 30-90 days, international/Singapore region only
providers.rate_limits: Qwen open & proprietary models
providers.notes: Excludes batch processing, context caching, fine-tuning, and dedicated deployment

providers.name: Modal
providers.rate_limits: Starter: 100 containers + 10 GPU concurrency, 5 crons, 1-day log retention
providers.notes: Corrected from a previously listed "$5-30/month" range; this is a recurring monthly credit, not a one-time trial

providers.name: Inference.net
providers.rate_limits: 30 req/min mentioned in the pricing table
providers.notes: Could not verify the "$1, up to $25 after a survey" credit mechanism against docs.inference.net, pricing, or registration pages. A separate "Grants Program" exists (up to $10,000 in compute for open-source projects) but is a different offer — flagged for re-verification

providers.name: Hyperbolic
providers.rate_limits: DeepSeek, Llama, Qwen variants
providers.notes: Could not confirm the "$1" trial amount on public pages (likely dashboard-only after signup). A historical separate $15 promo for .edu emails exists, suggesting the amount has changed over time — flagged for re-verification

providers.name: SambaNova Cloud
providers.rate_limits: Free Tier: 20 RPM / 20 RPD / 200,000 TPD across all models; Developer Tier (card required): 60-240 RPM depending on model
providers.notes: Confirmed models: DeepSeek, Llama-3.3-70B, Gemma-3-31B, gpt-oss-120b

providers.name: Scaleway Generative APIs
providers.free_tier: 1,000,000 tokens free + 60 min Whisper transcription; billing starts at token 1,000,001
providers.rate_limits: Gemma, Llama, Mistral, Qwen

providers.name: NVIDIA NIM
providers.rate_limits: Some models have reduced context windows on the free trial
providers.notes: NVIDIA may discontinue the trial at any time with no continuity obligation, per its own Trial Terms of Service

providers.name: Vercel AI Gateway
providers.rate_limits: Routes to multiple supported providers rather than being a model host itself
providers.notes: The "$5/month" figure doesn't appear in official reference docs, only in the community forum. Free tier confirmed but covers "a subset of models" with reduced limits; moving to a paid tier means "the monthly free credit no longer applies" — suggests a one-time benefit, not a recurring monthly one as previously stated. Flagged for re-verification

providers.name: SiliconFlow
providers.free_tier: Several models permanently free (e.g. Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct and others) at $0 cost, plus a $1 welcome credit for paid models
providers.rate_limits: Fixed per-model limits for free models; generic docs cite ranges of 1,000-10,000 RPM and 50,000-5,000,000 TPM depending on model tier — exact limits shown in-account
providers.notes: Signup requires SMS phone verification. Full "real-name authentication" (needed for recharging/billing) requires a mainland China, Hong Kong/Macao, or Taiwan ID document — this may limit full access for users without one, though basic use of free models appears reachable with standard account verification

providers.name: Z.ai (Zhipu AI / GLM)
providers.free_tier: GLM-4.5-Flash, GLM-4.7-Flash (text), and GLM-4.6V-Flash (vision) are officially listed as $0 cost (input, cached input, and output) on a permanent basis
providers.rate_limits: Not specified with concrete RPM/TPM figures in public docs
providers.notes: Terms of Use prohibit using the service to "develop, train, or improve" competing algorithms or models — otherwise general use, including commercial, isn't restricted

providers.name: IBM watsonx.ai (Lite plan)
providers.free_tier: Lite plan: 300,000 tokens/month for foundation model inference, 20 CUH/month for ML tooling, 100 pages/month of document text extraction
providers.rate_limits: 2 inference requests per second (explicitly documented for the Lite plan)
providers.notes: Lite plan doesn't support fine-tuning of foundation or custom models; 1-day idle deployment timeout. Never expires or bills while inside quota, but a payment method (with a nominal ~$1 authorization hold) is required at signup

providers.name: OVHcloud AI Endpoints
providers.free_tier: Several open-weight models in the catalog (e.g. Qwen3Guard) are listed as $0 per token, permanently, via two access modes: anonymous (no account) and authenticated (API key tied to a Public Cloud project)
providers.rate_limits: Anonymous access: 2 requests/min per IP per model. Authenticated (API key): 400 requests/min per project per model. Exceeding either returns HTTP 429
providers.notes: European provider (France), relevant for EU data-sovereignty/GDPR-conscious use. The authenticated tier needs a valid payment method on the project (though "Free" models themselves don't charge); anonymous access needs neither an account nor a card. A separate general $200 Public Cloud trial voucher also exists but is unrelated to this permanent free-model tier
